scripts.tauri:dev: node ../../scripts/ensure-tauri-rust-toolchain.mjs && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../../scripts/ensure-tauri-dev-binary-unlocked.ps1 -SrcTauriDir src-tauri -BinaryName sdkwork-birdcoder-desktop && node ../../scripts/ensure-tauri-target-clean.mjs src-tauri && node ../../scripts/ensure-tauri-dev-port-free.mjs 127.0.0.1 1520 && node ../../scripts/run-tauri-cli.mjs dev
scripts.tauri:dev:test: node ../../scripts/ensure-tauri-rust-toolchain.mjs && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../../scripts/ensure-tauri-dev-binary-unlocked.ps1 -SrcTauriDir src-tauri -BinaryName sdkwork-birdcoder-desktop && node ../../scripts/ensure-tauri-target-clean.mjs src-tauri && node ../../scripts/ensure-tauri-dev-port-free.mjs 127.0.0.1 1520 && node ../../scripts/run-tauri-cli.mjs dev --config src-tauri/tauri.test.conf.json --vite-mode test
